item.title: SHOP OPEN!
item.description: HUI-HUI says: "SHOP OPEN!" SPRING STOCK SALE with HUI-HUI and FRIENDS. Opening: Do 27.03.2008 (16-22h) Music: DJ RON. LIVE AT GIRL.TV STORE HAMBURG.
item.author: press@girl.tv (press)

item.title: best news are old news
item.description: The Willson vs. Tricks 7" is only available at EK-Shop. Check out: www.einlegen.de/shop New Willson media in the forest! Live video from the girl.tv/land exhibition at Kunsthaus Graz. And some NEW Photos shot by the ronz.
item.author: press@girl.tv (press)

item.title: telegram from hui-hui
item.description: hui-hui presents autumn-winter 08 09 collection at Telegram Showroom Berlin. 28 january - 3 february 2008. Telegram Showroom, Friedrichstrasse 112a, 10117 Berlin, (10am - 8pm)
item.author: press@girl.tv (press)

item.title: lighting up pictures
item.description: two new picture and a light box at elena's place.
item.author: press@girl.tv (press)

item.title: girl.tv tidied up...
item.description:
the boys           girl.tv           me               bunny
the girl.tv country was caught in a mess. so girl.tv, the girl, asked her boys, which represent the community, to clean it up. the boys were bussy, so me, that is the name of the boy, had to do it all alone. well, now it looks much better. this is a net.art project, which is currently reflecting the culture of social networks and the commercial context of the internet. besides it is a platform for subcultural and contemporary emergences. sometimes i feel like having to explain a mediocre joke.
item.author: we@girl.tv (me)

item.title: the aliens
item.description:
the journey to outer space

girl.tv was lonley and he took his space shuttel to visit some aliens...
more informations you get at http://girl.tv...
item.author: press@girl.tv (paris)
